name: check-material-stock
description: Returns current unrestricted-use stock for a material, optionally scoped to a plant or storage location. Highlights when stock is below the material's reorder point.
utterances: How much MAT-1001 do we have in plant 1710?
Do we have MAT-1001 in stock?
Check inventory for 4711 in warehouse WH01
What's on hand for MAT-2000 across all plants?

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: Plant code. If omitted, returns totals across all plants the user is authorized for.

parameters.name: storageLocation
parameters.description: Storage location. If omitted, aggregates across all storage locations.

input.$filter: Material eq '{{ material }}'{% if plant %} and Plant eq '{{ plant }}'{% endif %}{% if storageLocation %} and StorageLocation eq '{{ storageLocation }}'{% endif %}
